meaning: n.振动器,振荡器,(按摩)颤震器
examples: They're in your dry-cleaning bags, household items and -- it turns out -- maybe even your vibrator.
In the Indiana survey, 11 percent of vibrator users reported occasional numbness and 3 percent experienced it frequently.
Damping rate of the vibrator of the oscillograph is one of the important parameters, as it effects the dynamic characteristics of the vibrator.
